creator: lordi@msdi.ca
text:
I also have the same problem on all of these systems With mysql-client-5.5.6_1 and php5-5.3.3_2

 

1x           FreeBSD ezmaxf01 8.0-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE-p4 #0: Mon Jul 12 20:55:11 UTC 2010     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

5x           FreeBSD dev.msdi.local 7.2-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE-p8 #0: Tue May 25 17:51:43 UTC 2010     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64 

1x           ezmaxbackup 7.2-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE-p8 #0: Wed May 26 03:08:50 UTC 2010     root@i386-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386

 

I upgraded mysql using portupgrade -a and no compile time options...

 

I will provided all the help you need in resolving this problem.

 

Let me know if I can be useful in any way

 

Regards
